name: ledger-core
description: Universal reconciliation engine built on Nomba Virtual Accounts

scripts.db:setup: npm run migrate --prefix server && npm run db:bootstrap --prefix server
scripts.dev: npm run dev --prefix server 2>&1 | npx pino-pretty
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix server && npm run typecheck --prefix frontend
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck --prefix server && npm run test --prefix server && npm run build --prefix server && npm run lint --prefix frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3050 npm run build --prefix frontend
